title: Bertie Hodd Dad Jokes
description: Good evening, esteemed delegates, and welcome to the inaugural National Dad Conference - exploring the big questions about what it means to be a father today and celebrating those who excel in the field. We know you were expecting a rendition of Bertie Hodd’s 5 star, award-winning, genre-resisting show ‘Dad Jokes’ but due to a recent third-life crisis, they have decided to throw their toys out of the proverbial pram and instead retire from fatherhood to walk the Camino de Santiago. (Like father, like drag artist). So, please join us for the last time to celebrate the fatherliest of figures as we give him the send off he deserves (lots of booing and telling him he was a shit dad anyway). Conference agenda to be sent out shortly. Audience dress code: your finest Dad attire. Socks and sandals are highly encouraged. Expect special guests.

venue.name: WundaBarn at The SpiegelGardens
venue.address: Victoria Gardens, Brighton and Hove, East Sussex

reviews.reviewer: By The Reviews Hub - East Anglia & South East May 22, 2025 Updated: August 10, 2
reviews.excerpt: Extraordinary show that strikes the perfect balance between performance and personal reflections. We’re in an intimate space just off the seafront in Brighton for a quick catch-up in Dad’s shed. With a golden-crested-chaffinch twittering in the background, stylish gilet on-hand, and supersized cuppa, complete in a ‘favourite farter’ mug, all must be well.
